title: Sword FX
description: This pack adds a smooth light animation to every sword.
body:
![Sword FX](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2d11e5c508c491db0c887bc6e3473be4e1936a44.png)


Adds a subtle glow animation to all swords. Keeps vanilla style. No gameplay changes.
Report a problem [HERE](https://reportaproblem.framer.website/)

- Wooden Sword ✅

- Stone Sword ✅

- Golden Sword ✅

- Iron Sword ✅

- Diamond Sword ✅

- Netherite Sword ✅

- Enchanted Swords ❌ 
>   The Enchanted Swords soon...
